scripts.dev:repo: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@codemation/test-dev... --filter=!@codemation/next-host --filter=!@codemation/eslint-config && pnpm exec turbo run dev --filter=@codemation/test-dev... --filter=!@codemation/next-host --filter=!@codemation/eslint-config
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && pnpm run dupcheck && pnpm run antipatterns
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
